description: Domain architecture comparison between eryAIII (PKS) and human FASN (FAS) showing the key structural differences that refute the FAS annotation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(16, 10), gridspec_kw={'height_ratios': [1.5, 1.5, 2]})

# Color scheme
colors = {
    'KS': '#e74c3c',    # Red
    'AT': '#3498db',     # Blue
    'KR': '#2ecc71',     # Green
    'DH': '#9b59b6',     # Purple
    'ER': '#e67e22',     # Orange
    'ACP': '#f1c40f',    # Yellow
    'TE': '#1abc9c',     # Teal
    'Dock': '#95a5a6',   # Gray
    'MAT': '#3498db',    # Blue (same as AT)
    'KAC': '#c0392b',    # Dark red
    'LD': '#7f8c8d',     # Dark gray
}

# === Panel 1: eryAIII (DEBS3) domain architecture ===
ax1 = axes[0]
ax1.set_xlim(0, 3200)
ax1.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)

# eryAIII domains (approximate positions based on 3171 aa)
eryAIII_domains = [
    ('Dock', 1, 40, 'Dock'),
    ('KS', 50, 450, 'KS5'),
    ('KAC', 450, 530, 'KAC'),
    ('AT', 530, 850, 'AT5'),
    ('KR', 850, 1200, 'KR5'),
    ('ACP', 1200, 1300, 'ACP5'),
    ('KS', 1400, 1800, 'KS6'),
    ('KAC', 1800, 1880, 'KAC'),
    ('AT', 1880, 2200, 'AT6'),
    ('KR', 2200, 2550, 'KR6'),
    ('ACP', 2550, 2650, 'ACP6'),
    ('TE', 2900, 3171, 'TE'),
]

for dtype, start, end, label in eryAIII_domains:
    color = colors.get(dtype, '#bdc3c7')
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((start, 0.1), end-start, 0.8, 
                                    boxstyle="round,pad=3", 
                                    facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5)
    ax1.add_patch(rect)
    ax1.text((start+end)/2, 0.5, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# Module brackets
ax1.annotate('', xy=(50, 1.2), xytext=(1300, 1.2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='|-|', color='black', lw=1.5))
ax1.text(675, 1.35, 'Module 5', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

ax1.annotate('', xy=(1400, 1.2), xytext=(2650, 1.2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='|-|', color='black', lw=1.5))
ax1.text(2025, 1.35, 'Module 6', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

ax1.set_title('eryAIII / DEBS3 (A4F7P1) — Type I Modular Polyketide Synthase\n3171 aa, EC 2.3.1.94', 
              fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50')
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue position')
ax1.set_yticks([])
ax1.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax1.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax1.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# === Panel 2: Human FASN domain architecture ===
ax2 = axes[1]
ax2.set_xlim(0, 2600)
ax2.set_ylim(-0.5, 1.5)

# Human FASN domains (approximate, 2511 aa)
fasn_domains = [
    ('KS', 1, 400, 'KS'),
    ('MAT', 500, 800, 'MAT'),
    ('DH', 850, 1150, 'DH'),
    ('ER', 1550, 1850, 'ER'),
    ('KR', 1870, 2100, 'KR'),
    ('ACP', 2120, 2200, 'ACP'),
    ('TE', 2220, 2511, 'TE'),
]

for dtype, start, end, label in fasn_domains:
    color = colors.get(dtype, '#bdc3c7')
    rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((start, 0.1), end-start, 0.8,
                                    boxstyle="round,pad=3",
                                    facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5)
    ax2.add_patch(rect)
    ax2.text((start+end)/2, 0.5, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, fontweight='bold')

# Single module bracket
ax2.annotate('', xy=(1, 1.2), xytext=(2511, 1.2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='|-|', color='black', lw=1.5))
ax2.text(1255, 1.35, 'Single iterative module', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

ax2.set_title('Human FASN (P49327) — Type I Iterative Fatty Acid Synthase\n2511 aa, EC 2.3.1.85', 
              fontsize=12, fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50')
ax2.set_xlabel('Residue position')
ax2.set_yticks([])
ax2.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['right'].set_visible(False)
ax2.spines['left'].set_visible(False)

# === Panel 3: Evidence summary ===
ax3 = axes[2]
ax3.axis('off')

evidence_text = """
EVIDENCE SUMMARY: GO:0004312 (fatty acid synthase activity) is INCORRECT for eryAIII

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  Failure Mode 1: GRANULARITY / FAMILY-vs-SUBFAMILY ERROR                          │
│                                                                                     │
│  PANTHER Family PTHR43775: "FATTY ACID SYNTHASE"                                   │
│  PANTHER Subfamily SF51: "POLYKETIDE SYNTHASE TYPE I PKS1-RELATED"  ← correct!     │
│                                                                                     │
│  TreeGrafter propagated the family-level GO term instead of the subfamily function │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Key Differences:                                                                   │
│  • eryAIII has 2 modules (non-iterative) vs FAS single iterative module            │
│  • eryAIII LACKS DH and ER domains (essential for FAS)                             │
│  • eryAIII HAS PKS-specific docking domain, KAsynt_C_assoc                        │
│  • EC 2.3.1.94 (erythronolide synthase) ≠ EC 2.3.1.85 (fatty acid synthase)       │
│  • 0/3 FAS-specific InterPro entries (IPR003965/023102/026025) match eryAIII       │
│  • All catalytic residues INTACT → not a pseudo-enzyme                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Correct GO term: GO:0047879 (erythronolide synthase activity) — already annotated │
│  Curation action: REMOVE GO:0004312 (fatty acid synthase activity)                 │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
"""
ax3.text(0.02, 0.95, evidence_text, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=9,
         verticalalignment='top', fontfamily='monospace',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#ecf0f1', edgecolor='#2c3e50', alpha=0.9))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('domain_architecture_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: domain_architecture_comparison.png")
